fieldDescription: Select a preset to override all settings below. Choose Custom to use individual settings.

defaultValue: [IMPORTANT:] THE SLIDERS BELOW ONLY HAVE AN EFFECT WHEN THE [CUSTOM] PRESET IS SELECTED. All other presets use their own hardcoded values.
